_comment: Flow 2 — Multi-DB AI Query → Merge → Decision Route → Module Nodes → Inbox Reply
1. Inbox Trigger fires when a new message arrives
2. PostgreSQL node fetches the contact profile (CRM/customer DB)
3. MongoDB node fetches engagement history (events, interactions)
4. Merge node joins both datasets on email key
5. Three chained Decision nodes route the contact to the right module:
6. Each branch creates/logs the record in the matching module (NocoBase)
7. An AI Action node composes a personalised reply using the merged data
8. Send Reply delivers the drafted message back to the inbox conversation
Import via: Visual Builder → top-right menu → Import JSON

config.query: SELECT id, name, email, phone, contact_type, company, tags FROM contacts WHERE email = '{{inbox_trigger_1.contact.email}}' LIMIT 1

config.computedFields:
engagement_count = right.length || 0
last_event = right[0]?.event_type || 'none'
lead_score = Math.min(100, (right.length || 0) * 10)

op_fields.title: Deal for {{merge_1.result.company}} — {{merge_1.result.name}}
op_fields.notes: Auto-created lead from inbox trigger. Engagement score: {{merge_1.result.lead_score}}. Last event: {{merge_1.result.last_event}}

config.instruction: Write a highly professional and welcoming sales reply for a new lead named {{merge_1.result.name}} from {{merge_1.result.company}}. They are asking about pricing/trials. Let them know we offer a 14-day free trial and we'd love to schedule a quick demo. Keep it under 80 words.

config.messageContent: Hi {{merge_1.result.name}}, thanks for reaching out! We offer a 14-day free trial and would love to show you a demo.

op_fields.description: Support request from {{merge_1.result.name}} ({{merge_1.result.email}}). Last engagement: {{merge_1.result.last_event}}. Engagement count: {{merge_1.result.engagement_count}}

config.instruction: Write a helpful and empathetic support reply to {{merge_1.result.name}}. Acknowledge their issue (could be billing, bugs, or upgrades), let them know our support team has received the ticket, and we'll escalate it immediately. Under 80 words.

config.messageContent: Hi {{merge_1.result.name}}, we've received your request. Our support team is looking into this and will get back to you shortly.

config.entityData: {"name":"{{merge_1.result.name}}","email":"{{merge_1.result.email}}","phone":"{{merge_1.result.phone}}","program":"individual","goals":"Goals determined from intake. Engagement score: {{merge_1.result.lead_score}}","notes":"Client interacted via chat. Last engagement: {{merge_1.result.last_event}}"}

config.instruction: Write an energetic, motivating reply for {{merge_1.result.name}} who is a coaching client asking about features/workflows. Confirm we're taking their feedback to heart and express excitement about their progress. Under 90 words.

config.messageContent: Hi {{merge_1.result.name}}, welcome to your coaching journey! Your feedback is incredibly valuable to us.

config.entityData: {"title":"Project for {{merge_1.result.name}}","client_name":"{{merge_1.result.name}}","client_email":"{{merge_1.result.email}}","budget":"","deadline":"","status":"draft","description":"General inquiry routed to freelancer workflow. Lead score: {{merge_1.result.lead_score}}"}

config.instruction: Write a general, friendly acknowledgement for {{merge_1.result.name}} from {{merge_1.result.company}}. Confirm we received their message and will respond fully within 24 hours. Under 90 words.

config.messageContent: Hi {{merge_1.result.name}}, thanks for reaching out! We've received your message and will reply shortly.
